name: French Doughnut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Lightly spray muffin tin with cooking spray.
3. Beat the egg in a bowl.
4. Add milk and melted margarine to the bowl with the egg. Stir until combined.
5. In another bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg.
6. Blend the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until well combined.
7. Fill greased muffin tins about 1/2 full with batter.
8. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove muffins from the oven immediately and dip each in remaining melted margarine.
10. Roll the cooled muffins in a mixture of cinnamon, sugar, and vanilla extract.
11. Serve warm.
